channel.title: Iptv on Margrop Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Iptv on Margrop Blog

item.title: IPTV source collection from GitHub - updated on 2024/6/10
item.description:
IPTV source collection

Source lists:

  • https://epg.pw/test_channel_page.html
  • iptv.org
  • YueChan/Live
  • YanG-1989/m3u
  • fanmingming/live
  • qwerttvv/Beijing-IPTV
  • joevess/IPTV
  • Meroser/IPTV The project content has been removed by Author

EPG sources:

  • fanmingming/live
  • 112114.xyz
  • epg.51zmt.top:8000

For more source lists, see https://m3u.ibert.me.

item.title: Kodi IPTV live source m3u8 collection - 2021 edition
item.description: Because of copyright restrictions, many live TV apps stutter during playback and the picture quality is often poor. Today, most broadband providers offer IPTV services, so you can watch TV in high definition without lag and without installing cable TV. If you have not activated IPTV, you can still use live source URLs shared by other users and copy them to your computer, TV box, or other devices. If you are comfortable with packet capture, you can also collect the live source URLs yourself.
